title: erigeron pappocromus var. stellatus
intro: Erigeron pappocromus var. stellatus, also known as Stellate Fleabane, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to North America. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a potential remedy for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Stellate Fleabane include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used for medicinal purposes.
